    |  product image |  price / price-discount unit
    |                | vendor name 
                        short description
    <..1 2 3 .... >     Delivary category     Product category
                        Long Description
                        Required Items list
                            item 1
                            item 2
                            item 3
                            ...
                        Optional items list
                            item 1
                            item 2
                            item 3
                            ...
    ------------------  [Edit Product only if this belongs to this vendor]


    - every detail comes in the /api/product/id ...
    after clicking edit go to productEditorAdd page
